feature_importances.name: avg_hashtags
feature_importances.label: Avg. hashtags
feature_importances.desc: Mean hashtags per post.

feature_importances.name: hashtag_ratio
feature_importances.label: Hashtag ratio
feature_importances.desc: Fraction of posts containing at least one hashtag.

feature_importances.name: std_tweet_len
feature_importances.label: Post length variability
feature_importances.desc: Std-dev of post length; humans vary more than templates.

feature_importances.name: night_post_ratio
feature_importances.label: Off-hours posting
feature_importances.desc: Fraction of posts made between 00:00-06:00 UTC.

feature_importances.name: std_time_gap
feature_importances.label: Posting rhythm variability
feature_importances.desc: Std-dev of inter-post gaps; bots are often metronomic.

feature_importances.name: url_ratio
feature_importances.label: Link ratio
feature_importances.desc: Fraction of posts containing a URL.

feature_importances.name: avg_word_count
feature_importances.label: Avg. word count
feature_importances.desc: Mean words per post.

feature_importances.name: avg_tweet_len
feature_importances.label: Avg. post length
feature_importances.desc: Mean character count per post.

feature_importances.name: reported_tweet_count
feature_importances.label: Lifetime tweet count
feature_importances.desc: Account-level tweet total reported in profile metadata.

feature_importances.name: z_score
feature_importances.label: Activity z-score
feature_importances.desc: How far the account's activity sits from the population mean.

feature_importances.name: post_count
feature_importances.label: Posts in window
feature_importances.desc: Number of posts the account made in the sample window.

feature_importances.name: min_time_gap
feature_importances.label: Fastest burst
feature_importances.desc: Shortest gap between two posts (seconds).

feature_importances.name: avg_caps_ratio
feature_importances.label: Uppercase ratio
feature_importances.desc: Share of letters that are uppercase.

feature_importances.name: avg_digit_ratio
feature_importances.label: Digit ratio
feature_importances.desc: Share of characters that are digits.

feature_importances.name: description_length
feature_importances.label: Bio length
feature_importances.desc: Character length of the profile description.

feature_importances.name: avg_time_gap
feature_importances.label: Avg. gap between posts
feature_importances.desc: Mean seconds between consecutive posts.

feature_importances.name: posts_per_hour
feature_importances.label: Posts per active hour
feature_importances.desc: Posting rate across the account's active span.

feature_importances.name: avg_mentions
feature_importances.label: Avg. mentions
feature_importances.desc: Mean @-mentions per post.

feature_importances.name: mention_ratio
feature_importances.label: Mention ratio
feature_importances.desc: Fraction of posts containing at least one mention.

feature_importances.name: unique_text_ratio
feature_importances.label: Unique-post ratio
feature_importances.desc: Fraction of posts with distinct text (repetition = automation).

feature_importances.name: has_location
feature_importances.label: Has location
feature_importances.desc: Whether the profile lists a location.

feature_importances.name: has_description
feature_importances.label: Has bio
feature_importances.desc: Whether the profile has a non-empty description.
